propositions: Denormalized author identity (name + email) plus an optional author_id is stamped onto every mutating event's envelope.
author_email() reads git config user.email and returns a fallback without raising on unset/OSError/non-zero exit/timeout.
attribution_fields includes author_id only when resolve_current_identity is non-None, omitting it otherwise.
All four envelope-composing sites (append_event, txn cores, delete writers, compact snapshot) stamp attribution via an attribution dict parameter.
A repo-keyed cache ensures the git-email lookup and identity resolution each run at most once per repo_root per process.
Pre-change events without author_email/author_id reduce byte-identically with no new keys, and reducer surfaces attribution present-only where author already lives.
